text:

  FreeBSD doc repository

  Modified files:

  Log:
  PR:     www/152390
  
  Replace "FreeBSD Mexico - http://www.freebsd.org.mx" with "The FreeBSD Mexican Community - http://www.freebsd.mx".
  
  "FreeBSD Mexico" has not been updated for years and it seems nobody is answering emails anymore ...
  
  Requested by:   Ernesto Vazquez (ernesto att freebsd dott mx)
